message:
feat(clients): export additional CLI client wrappers

Adds exports for more CLI tool clients from the flywheel-clients package:
- giil: Image link extractor client
- rch: Remote compilation helper client
- slb: Two-person authorization (simultaneous launch button) client
- xf: X (Twitter) archive search client

These clients provide TypeScript interfaces for the corresponding CLI tools,
enabling programmatic access to their functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
